state_manifold.embedding_function: word-evaluation in generators S,T,(T^{-1}) followed by PSL normalization
constraints: Matrices represent elements of PSL_2(Z) via M ~ -M
Congruence reduction is rho_N: PSL_2(Z) -> PSL_2(Z/NZ), implemented by entrywise mod N and PSL normalization
Kernel elements satisfy k ≡ I (mod N) in SL_2(Z), hence rho_N(kM)=rho_N(M)

invariants.name: factor_through_rhoN
invariants.definition: A label L factors through rho_N iff for all k ∈ ker(rho_N) and all M (in scope), L(kM)=L(M)

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_id mismatch or missing required fields
rho_N(M) != rho_N(M') for a purported forced-collision pair
certificate claims counterexample but recomputed labels match
label computation raises or is undefined on provided matrices
bounded-search certificate claims pass but recomputation finds counterexample

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: All checks are deterministic given explicit matrices/words, modulus N, label definition, and (for bounded-search) a fixed RNG seed and explicit construction recipe.
